description_long: This helicopter features a streamlined fuselage with a predominantly orange lower body and white upper section, accented by black-tinted cockpit windows. The main rotor consists of four long, slender blades with alternating black and white segments, while the tail rotor is mounted on the vertical stabilizer at the rear. The landing skids are orange, tubular, and reinforced with crossbars for stability. The cockpit is equipped with large, angular windows that wrap around the front and sides, providing excellent visibility for pilots. The tail boom extends smoothly from the main body, ending in a vertical fin with a horizontal stabilizer. No visible registration numbers or alphanumeric markings are present on the exterior.
description: A modern orange and white helicopter with four-blade main rotor, tubular landing skids, and large black-tinted cockpit windows.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full span of the main rotor blades and the streamlined shape of the fuselage.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the orange and white color scheme, cockpit windows, landing skids, and tail rotor.
description_view_2: Front view emphasizing the angular cockpit windows, nose profile, and symmetrical landing skids.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the tail boom, rotor, and landing skids.
attribute_rotor_blades: Four long, narrow main rotor blades with alternating black and white segments, likely made of composite material, each blade extending nearly the full width of the helicopter.
attribute_tail_rotor: Tail rotor is present on the vertical stabilizer, appears to have two blades oriented vertically, colored orange and white, with no visible protective shroud.
attribute_landing_skids: Tubular orange landing skids with crossbar supports, made of metal, extending parallel to the fuselage and providing stable ground contact.
attribute_cockpit_windows: Five large, angular cockpit windows: three in front and two on the sides, black-tinted with visible framing, providing wide visibility.
